overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a coastal urban park with sculpted red rock formations, a circular fountain pool, and modern skyscrapers in the background. The character climbs rock walls, wades through a pool with a panoramic city view, and walks along the shoreline on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: skate park with sculpted red rock formations

events.description: character begins climbing up the vertical rock wall face

agents.ego_description: walking across the reddish compacted earth toward the rock formation and climbing up the textured wall

entered.detail: large reddish-orange rock structure with vertical walls and carved surfaces
cluster of palm trees lining the edge of the park area
distant modern glass skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open skate park area with reddish earth toward a large sculpted rock formation. Palm trees line the perimeter and a modern city skyline is visible in the distance. The character approaches and begins climbing the rock wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rock platform with circular fountain pool

events.description: character reaches the top of the rock formation revealing the circular pool ahead
character steps into the shallow water of the circular pool

agents.ego_description: walking along the top of the rock platform toward the circular pool and entering the water

entered.detail: round pool with clear greenish water and a central fountain feature
flat rock surface forming the elevated platform underfoot

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the top of the rock formation where a circular fountain pool comes into view. The city skyline shifts to the background behind the pool. The character approaches and steps into the shallow water, which has a central fountain feature.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular pool with panoramic city skyline views

events.description: character stops walking and stands still in the pool water
camera begins rotating 360 degrees around the stationary character

agents.ego_description: standing still in the pool water while the camera rotates to show the surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: tall glass and steel office towers with reflective surfaces dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary in the circular pool as the camera performs a full rotation, revealing panoramic views of the modern glass skyscrapers and palm tree groves surrounding the park. The water is clear with a visible fountain in the center.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from rock platform to beach waterfront

events.description: character exits the pool and begins descending from the rock platform
character reaches the sandy beach level near the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking out of the pool, down the rock formation, and onto the sandy beach area

entered.detail: light colored sandy area leading down to the water's edge
calm blue-green body of water with distant landmasses visible

segments.scene_description: The character exits the circular pool and descends from the elevated rock platform down to a sandy beach area. The ocean comes into view ahead with the city skyline now visible to the right. The character walks across the sand toward the waterfront.

events.description: character reaches the water's edge and begins walking along the shoreline
character stops at the water's edge looking out toward the distant islands

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline at the water's edge, occasionally stopping to look out at the ocean and distant landmarks

entered.detail: rocky landmasses and structures visible across the water
large white passenger vessel visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy shoreline at the water's edge, with the calm ocean stretching ahead. Distant islands and a cruise ship are visible on the horizon. The character stops to observe the view while the city skyline remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a red-rock urban park up to an elevated vantage point and finally down to a serene coastal shoreline. It begins with the character crossing a reddish skate park toward a sculpted rock formation, climbing the wall as the modern city skyline looms in the distance. As the character reaches the summit, the scene shifts toward a circular fountain pool where the character wades into the shallow water, triggering a full camera rotation that reveals a panoramic view of glass skyscrapers and palm groves. The camera then follows the character as they descend from the elevated platform onto a sandy beach, with the city skyline shifting to the right as the ocean opens up ahead. Finally, the movement leads along the water's edge toward the horizon, where distant islands and a cruise ship appear under the bright sun.
